title: Change owner for materialized views or streaming tables defined in Databricks SQL
body: You can now change the owner for materialized views or streaming tables defined in Databricks SQL through Catalog Explorer. For materialized view details, see [Configure standalone materialized views](/aws/en/ldp/dbsql/materialized-configure). For streaming table details, see [Use standalone streaming tables](/aws/en/ldp/dbsql/streaming).
